title: hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. glabratoidiforme
intro: Hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. glabratoidiforme is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium genus, a type of flowering plant commonly known as hawkweed. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine. The Hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. glabratoidiforme is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make infusions or teas, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
